productDisplayName: Nike Unisex India Stadium Blue Cap
description: For those who love cricket, this cap from nike makes for a perfect addition to your sporty wardrobe. Made of 100% cotton with eyelets for breathable comfort Curved visor to protect the eyes from sunlight Buckle strap at the back for a custom Fit Orange piping running from back to front on both sides Embroidered cricket logo on the front, nike swoosh on side and “India” on back Cap care Hand wash in warm water Line dry Do not wring, bleach, tumble dry, iron or dry clean
